---
title: Privacy Policy
description: Privacy and data handling policy for adafede.github.io.
---

## Scope

This privacy policy applies to `https://adafede.github.io`.

## Data Collection

This website is a static site and does not provide user accounts, comments, or forms.

- Server infrastructure may process standard request logs (IP address, user-agent, timestamp, requested URL) for delivery, caching, and abuse prevention.
- Aggregated traffic analytics are collected with Simple Analytics (`https://scripts.simpleanalyticscdn.com/latest.js`).
- This site does not intentionally set tracking cookies for analytics.

## Third-Party Requests

Some pages include links or embedded resources from external services (for example Wikimedia-hosted images and Wikidata-powered views). When your browser loads those resources, those providers may receive technical request data according to their own privacy policies.

## AI Crawlers and Training

`robots.txt` includes explicit directives for AI crawler user-agents. These directives are intended to communicate crawling and reuse preferences.

## Your Choices

You can reduce data sharing by using browser privacy controls, content blockers, and DNS/network filtering for third-party domains.

## Contact

For privacy questions, contact: `rutz@imsb.biol.ethz.ch`

## Policy Updates

This page may be updated when site features or third-party services change.
